title: Nobody's Kid
writer: Kate Langley Bosher, Catherine Carr, Howard Hickman
actors: Mae Marsh, Kathleen Kirkham, Anne Schaefer
plot: Following her parents' deaths, Mary Cary is placed in an orphanage, as her grandfather rejects her because of the circumstances of her parents' marriage. At the orphanage Mary is mistreated and humiliated, and when a matron catche...
